title: aWATTar Market Data Response
description: Schema for the aWATTar API /v1/marketdata endpoint response containing hourly EPEX Spot electricity market prices

object.description: Type identifier for the response object

data.description: Array of hourly market price entries

MarketPriceEntry.title: Market Price Entry
MarketPriceEntry.description: A single hourly electricity market price data point from the EPEX Spot exchange

start_timestamp.description: Start of the pricing interval as Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds (UTC)

end_timestamp.description: End of the pricing interval as Unix epoch timestamp in milliseconds (UTC). Typically 3600000 ms (1 hour) after start_timestamp.

marketprice.description: EPEX Spot market price for the interval in EUR/MWh. Can be negative during periods of excess renewable energy supply.

unit.description: Unit of measurement for the market price
